The thriving of sugar-cane is presaged by the flowers of
Dttrvz grass and the sacred grass; outbreak of fires, by the Kovidftra
tree; and the increase and prosperity of concubines, by the growth
of the 6y3ma creeper.
uhrn \w*i\
When trees, bushes and creepers are seen fully packed with
green glossy leaves without any interspace, good rains are to be
predicted; whereas if the leaves be rough leaving inter-spaces, very
little rain should be declared.
[The commentator was silent upto the previous verse about
ancient authorities, and now he quotes under this Sloka :
PrfeiffcT ^ 11
It is possible that Bhattotpala had no access to any ancient texts
bearing on this subject except the one verse quoted here.
